items.title_en: Don't trust large context windows
items.title_zh: 别信任大型上下文窗口
items.summary_en: Large context windows are not a silver bullet for accuracy; models can still hallucinate or be misled by irrelevant or noisy signals. The post advocates architectures that rely on retrieval, modular reasoning, and careful evaluation of what the model actually uses from context.
items.summary_zh: 超大上下文窗口并不能保证推理的可靠性；模型仍可能出现幻觉或被无关信息干扰。文中提倡结合检索、模块化推理和对上下文用量的严格评估来提升系统稳健性。

items.title_en: Honda Civics and the Evil Valet
items.title_zh: 本田思域与邪恶的代客泊车
items.summary_en: A look at the security, privacy, and social-engineering pitfalls revealed when valet services interact with modern cars like the Honda Civic.
items.summary_zh: 探讨代客泊车服务与现代汽车互动时暴露的安全、隐私与社会工程学陷阱，聚焦思考如何降低风险。

items.title_en: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
items.title_zh: 亚马逊 CEO 与美国官员的会谈推动对 Anthropic 模型的打压
items.summary_en: High-level talks between Amazon and U.S. officials appear to have escalated regulatory scrutiny on Anthropic-models. The episode underscores how policy negotiations can influence AI deployment and access.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊与美国官员的高层会谈推动对 Anthropic 模型的监管升级，凸显政策谈判会影响 AI 部署与获取。

items.title_en: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 Released
items.title_zh: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 发布
items.summary_en: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 continues the trend of building rich, real-time UIs with minimal client-side JS by focusing on stability and API enhancements. The release makes server-rendered interactivity more maintainable for Elixir teams, helping dashboards and live features ship faster.
items.summary_zh: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 继续推动服务器端渲染的实时 UI，强调稳定性和 API 的改进，使前端工作量下降、后端可用性提升。此次更新为使用 Elixir 构建交互式仪表板和实时功能的团队带来更易维护的工具与更快的迭代速度。

items.title_en: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
items.title_zh: 人口普查局发布的统计产品禁止噪声注入
items.summary_en: Privacy-preserving data often relies on adding noise; this policy change bans noise infusion in published statistics, shifting how privacy is maintained. The move could affect the utility of released data and push researchers to alternative methods, such as synthetic data or different disclosure controls. Data practitioners should watch for downstream effects on accuracy and bias in released datasets.
items.summary_zh: 人口普查局宣布在对外发布的统计产品中不再应用噪声注入以保护隐私。此举改变了以往通过添加随机噪声实现差分隐私的做法，可能影响数据可用性和分析精度。研究人员和机构或需转向其他隐私保护方法，如合成数据或新的披露控制策略。

items.title_en: GLM 5.2 Is Out
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2 已发布
items.summary_en: GLM 5.2 releases bring updates to the graphics math library, with API refinements and performance tweaks for modern rendering pipelines. Useful for developers targeting OpenGL and Vulkan workflows.
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2 发布，带来 API 精炼和性能优化，帮助开发者在现代渲染管线（OpenGL/Vulkan 等）中更高效地使用图形数学工具。

items.title_en: Free SQL→ER diagram tool, runs in the browser, nothing uploaded
items.title_zh: 浏览器端免费 SQL→ER 图工具，数据不上传
items.summary_en: A browser-based tool that converts SQL schemas into ER diagrams without sending data to the cloud. It helps developers visualize database structures locally, with options to export diagrams for documentation. The emphasis is privacy and accessibility for quick modeling.
items.summary_zh: 一个在浏览器中运行的工具，可将 SQL 架构转成 ER 图且不会把数据上传到云端。帮助开发者在本地直观地可视化数据库结构，并可导出图示用于文档。强调隐私和快速建模的便捷性。

items.title_en: ReactOS (FOSS "Windows") achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life on real hardware
items.title_zh: ReactOS 在真实硬件上实现 3D 加速的 Half-Life
items.summary_en: ReactOS achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life running on real hardware, showcasing progress toward a free, Windows-compatible OS capable of modern gaming performance. The achievement hinges on driver compatibility, GPU APIs, and community contributions to reverse-engineered Windows paths. It signals practical milestones for open-source Windows alternatives.
items.summary_zh: ReactOS 在真实硬件上实现了 3D 加速的 Half-Life，展示了其向免费、与 Windows 兼容系统迈进、可进行现代游戏的潜力。成就依赖驱动兼容性、GPU API 支持以及社区对逆向工程 Windows 路径的贡献。标志着开源 Windows 替代方案的一个现实里程碑。

items.title_en: Pac-Man, but you're the ghost
items.title_zh: 吃豆人：你来扮演鬼魂
items.summary_en: Reimagines Pac-Man by letting players control the pursuing ghost, flipping the usual chase dynamics. It highlights how changing the player's role can illuminate core tropes of classic arcade design.
items.summary_zh: 把吃豆人游戏反向设定成玩家扮演追逐者的幽灵，颠覆了传统的追逐规则。介绍了新的机制、关卡设计，以及这一改动对策略和跑分潜力的影响。通过改变玩家角色来揭示经典街机设计的核心要素。

items.title_en: Every Frame Perfect
items.title_zh: 每一帧都要完美
items.summary_en: A discourse on achieving pixel-perfect rendering across frames, weighing visual fidelity against performance in modern graphics pipelines. The piece offers practical perspectives on how engineers balance quality, predictability, and resource use to reach consistently polished results.
items.summary_zh: 关于在每一帧中实现像素级完美渲染的讨论，权衡在现代图形管线中视觉保真度与性能的关系。文中提出工程师在质量、可预测性和资源使用之间的平衡策略，以实现持续一致的高质量输出。

items.title_en: Police officer investigated for using AI to 'create evidence' in multiple cases
items.title_zh: 警官因在多起案件中使用 AI '制造证据' 而接受调查
items.summary_en: Derbyshire police officer is under investigation for allegedly using AI to generate or 'create' evidence in multiple cases. The investigation raises red flags about the reliability and admissibility of AI-assisted forensics, and could prompt tighter controls on how law enforcement uses AI in investigations.
items.summary_zh: 德比郡警方一名警官因涉嫌在多起案件中使用 AI 生成“证据”而接受调查。这一事件凸显了 AI 辅助取证的可靠性与证据可采性问题，或促使对执法部门使用 AI 的流程和监管加强。

items.title_en: Software Architecture Guide (2019)
items.title_zh: 软件架构指南（2019）
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler's Software Architecture Guide compiles timeless patterns and decisions shaping system quality attributes, from layering to microservices, with pragmatic trade-offs. It offers anchored explanations, anti-patterns, and checklists for architecture evaluation. A reference for engineers designing scalable, maintainable software.
items.summary_zh: Martin Fowler 的软件架构指南汇集影响系统质量属性的经典模式和抉择，从分层到微服务，并给出务实的权衡。提供带锚点的解释、反模式与评估清单，帮助评估架构设计。是设计可扩展、可维护软件的参考。

items.title_en: Israeli firm BlackCore suspected of meddling in New York and Scotland votes
items.title_zh: 以色列公司 BlackCore 被怀疑干预纽约与苏格兰选举
items.summary_en: Reuters reports that BlackCore, an Israeli political data firm, is suspected of attempting to influence votes in New York City and Scotland. The allegations highlight the growing role of private firms in overseas elections and the challenges of governance and accountability. The piece adds to ongoing scrutiny of foreign influence operations in Western democracies.
items.summary_zh: 据路透报道，一家以色列的政治数据公司 BlackCore 被怀疑干预纽约市和苏格兰的投票。报道强调私人公司在海外选举中的影响力及相关治理挑战。这件事体现了西方民主制度持续面对的外国干预风险。

items.title_en: AI coding at home without going broke
items.title_zh: 在家进行 AI 编码不花大钱
items.summary_en: Outlines budget-conscious ways to do AI-assisted coding from home, including affordable hardware, open-source models, and cost-saving workflows. It helps developers get productive with AI without breaking the bank.
items.summary_zh: 概述在家进行 AI 辅助编码的省钱做法，涵盖经济硬件、开源模型和成本控制的工作流，帮助开发者用 AI 提升效率而不过度花费。

items.title_en: The redistribution of housing wealth caused by rent control (2023) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 租金管制引发的住房财富再分配
items.summary_en: A study quantifies how rent control shifts housing wealth among tenants, landlords, and communities, revealing trade-offs between affordability and property value distribution. It discusses mechanisms like rent ceilings, property investment incentives, and neighborhood effects. The PDF provides data-driven insights for policy design.
items.summary_zh: 研究量化租金管制如何在租户、房东与社区之间重新分配住房财富，揭示可负担性与房产价值分布之间的权衡。讨论租金上限、房产投资激励与社区效应等机制，PDF 提供基于数据的政策设计见解。

items.title_en: Treating pancreatic tumours may have revealed cancer's master switch
items.title_zh: 治疗胰腺肿瘤或揭示癌症的主开关
items.summary_en: New research on treating pancreatic tumors points to a regulatory mechanism that may control cancer progression, potentially acting as a master switch. If confirmed, the finding could guide targeted therapies across multiple cancer types and accelerate precision medicine. The work highlights how deep tumor biology can reveal leverage points for therapies.
items.summary_zh: 一项关于治疗胰腺肿瘤的新研究指向一种可能控制癌症进展的调控机制，或被视为癌症的主开关。若证实，该发现可能为多种癌症的靶向治疗提供线索，加速精准医疗的发展，凸显肿瘤生物学揭示治疗关键点的潜力。

items.title_en: Tribblix: The retro Illumos distribution
items.title_zh: Tribblix：复古版 Illumos 发行版
items.summary_en: Tribblix resurrects Illumos as a usable, retro-styled distribution, blending OpenSolaris heritage with modern package management. The post explains how it preserves legacy features while offering a familiar Unix-like environment for enthusiasts and developers. It's a reminder of how alternative OS ecosystems keep historical ideas alive and accessible.
items.summary_zh: Tribblix 将 Illumos 以可用的复古发行版重新带回，融合了 OpenSolaris 的传统与现代包管理。它在保留历史特性与向爱好者、开发者提供熟悉的 Unix 风格环境之间取得平衡。这是对另类操作系统生态如何让历史理念继续存在并易于获取的一个注解。

items.title_en: 4 things to know about the new sunscreen ingredient the FDA approved
items.title_zh: FDA 批准的新防晒成分的四大要点
items.summary_en: FDA approves a novel UV-filter ingredient and outlines four key implications: broader protection, safety profile, environmental considerations, and labeling/usage guidance. It situates the ingredient within evolving sunscreen formulations and regulatory processes. Practical notes for consumers and product developers.
items.summary_zh: FDA 批准了一种新的防晒成分，并给出四点关键影响：更广的防护、安全性、环境因素与标签/使用指南。将该成分放在不断演进的防晒配方与监管框架中进行解读。为消费者与产品开发者提供实用要点。

items.title_en: GameBoy Workboy
items.title_zh: Game Boy 的 WorkBoy 键盘扩展
items.summary_en: A retro-hardware project detailing WorkBoy, a hardware addon that turn a Game Boy into a pocket computer with keyboard input and expanded capabilities. It showcases hobbyist ingenuity in repurposing classic hardware for modern usability.
items.summary_zh: 一项复古硬件项目，介绍了 WorkBoy 如何让 Game Boy 变成带键盘输入的袖珍电脑并扩展功能。展示了玩家将经典硬件改造为现代可用工具的创意。

items.title_en: Trial of 12mph bike lane speed limit grinds gears of Dutch cyclists
items.title_zh: 荷兰12英里/小时自行车道限速试点引发骑行者不满
items.summary_en: The Dutch trial of a 12 mph bike-lane speed limit sparked debate among cyclists and policymakers about safety, flow, and rider autonomy in dense urban cycling. It signals how regulatory experiments can reshape lane design and user behavior in Europe.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰对自行车道设定每小时12英里限速的试点引发了骑行者与政策制定者之间关于安全、通行与骑行自主权的讨论。此举或将重塑欧洲城市自行车道设计与使用行为。

items.title_en: AI OSS tool repo goes archived over night after raising $7.3M Seed
items.title_zh: AI 开源工具仓库融资后一夜之间归档
items.summary_en: An AI OSS project’s repository was archived overnight after a $7.3M seed round. This highlights how funding does not guarantee long-term maintenance or governance in open-source projects and raises questions about sustainability and stewardship. It illustrates the fragility of OSS ecosystems when strategic priorities shift.
items.summary_zh: 在完成730万美元种子轮融资后，一款 AI 开源工具的代码仓库在一夜之间被归档。这反映了资金并不能确保长期维护与治理，并引发对开源生态系统在战略优先级变化时的可持续性与托管的讨论。

items.title_en: A low-carbon computing platform from your retired phones
items.title_zh: 来自退役手机的低碳计算平台
items.summary_en: Researchers propose a computing platform that reuses retired smartphones to run workloads, cutting carbon emissions from new device production. The approach leverages edge computing and hardware reuse to offer scalable, energy-efficient compute at low cost. If adopted widely, it could complement data centers with greener options.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员提出一套将退役手机重新用于计算任务的平台，以减少新设备生产带来的碳排放。该方法利用边缘计算与硬件再利用，提供低成本、可扩展且更节能的计算能力。若广泛应用，或成为数据中心的绿色替代方案之一。

items.title_en: Making Claude a Chemist
items.title_zh: 让 Claude 成为化学家
items.summary_en: Anthropic demonstrates how Claude can be steered to assist with chemistry tasks, from reaction planning to data analysis, highlighting domain-specific prompting and safety considerations. The work shows progress toward AI systems that reason effectively in specialized disciplines. It also raises questions about toolchains and reliability in scientific workflows.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 展示了如何将 Claude 引导到化学任务中，从反应规划到数据分析，强调领域特定提示与安全考量。此举体现了 AI 在专业学科中的推理能力提升，同时也引发对科学工作流中工具链与可靠性的讨论。

items.title_en: The experience of rendering Arabic typography and its technical debt
items.title_zh: 渲染阿拉伯语排版的体验与技术债务
items.summary_en: Examines the challenges of rendering Arabic typography, including shaping, ligatures, and bidirectional text, and argues that technical debt from these aspects affects UI quality and future-proofing.
items.summary_zh: 分析阿拉伯语排版在字形、连字和双向文本处理上的挑战，指出相关的技术债务会影响界面质量和未来兼容性。

items.title_en: Weave: Merging based on language structure and not lines
items.title_zh: Weave：基于语言结构的合并
items.summary_en: Weave proposes a code-merge approach driven by syntax trees and language structure rather than line-based diffs. It argues this yields more semantic merges and fewer conflicts, especially for multi-language repos. The project includes a prototype and discuss tradeoffs with traditional VCS merging.
items.summary_zh: Weave 提出一种以语法树与语言结构为驱动的代码合并方法，而非逐行 diff。认为这样的合并能产生更语义化的结果、减少冲突，尤其适用于多语言代码库。文章还给出原型实现及与传统版本控制合并的权衡。

items.title_en: RTX 5080 and RTX 3090 Setup: 80 Tok/s on Qwen 3.6 27B Q8
items.title_zh: RTX 5080 与 RTX 3090 搭建：在 Qwen 3.6 27B Q8 上实现 80 token/s
items.summary_en: A hardware setup combining RTX 5080 and RTX 3090 achieves about 80 tokens per second on Qwen 3.6 27B Q8. The post demonstrates practical GPU pairing for efficient LLM inference, highlighting throughput, energy use, and cost considerations for enthusiasts and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 将 RTX 5080 与 RTX 3090 搭配使用，在 Qwen 3.6 27B Q8 上实现约 80 token/s 的推理速率。此文展示了用于高效大语言模型推理的实际 GPU 配置，重点讨论吞吐量、能耗及成本等考量，适合爱好者与研究人员参考。

items.title_en: The adder at the heart of Intel's 8087 floating-point chip
items.title_zh: 英特尔 8087 浮点芯片核心加法器
items.summary_en: A reverse-engineering look at the adder inside Intel's 8087 floating-point unit, revealing how early FP math hardware achieved its performance. It sheds light on vintage CPU design choices.
items.summary_zh: 对英特尔 8087 浮点单元核心加法器进行逆向工程式解析，揭示早期浮点数学硬件如何实现性能，以及当时的设计取舍。

items.title_en: Running DOS on Behringers DDX3216 with a DIY x86-Bios from Scratch
items.title_zh: 用自制 x86 BIOS 在 Behringer DDX3216 上运行 DOS
items.summary_en: Behringer DDX3216 is repurposed to run DOS via a DIY x86 BIOS built from scratch. This showcases creative hardware hacking to unlock legacy software on consumer gear.
items.summary_zh: 通过自制的原生 x86 BIOS 将 Behringer DDX3216 转用来运行 DOS，展示了如何用硬件黑客精神让普通设备运行遗留软件。

items.title_en: Building a serial and VGA "everything console"
items.title_zh: 打造一个串行与 VGA 的“全能控制台”
items.summary_en: A hands-on hardware project to assemble a single console supporting serial and VGA outputs, catering to retro computing and DIYers. It covers hardware choices, GPIO wiring, and simple firmware to drive multiple display and IO modes. The result is a compact, flexible teaching tool for exploring low-level interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 一个动手硬件项目，打造同时支持串行和 VGA 的“全能控制台”，面向复古计算与 DIY 爱好者。文章讲解硬件选型、GPIO 接线和驱动多显示/多输入模式的固件设计。成果是一个紧凑而灵活的低级接口学习工具。

items.title_en: Human Routers of Machine Words
items.title_zh: 人类是机器词汇的路由器
items.summary_en: Argues that humans currently route and curate machine-generated language in real time, serving as intermediaries between AI models and end users. It examines prompts, oversight, and the social-technical layer enabling reliable AI communication. The piece prompts reflection on responsibility and control in AI-mediated language.
items.summary_zh: 认为人类当前在AI生成内容与终端用户之间充当路由者与编目者，实时把控机器输出的语言。讨论提示设计、监督机制以及实现可靠AI沟通的社会-技术层。引发对 AI 语言交互中的责任与控制的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Paca – Lightweight Jira alternative for human-AI collaboration
items.title_zh: Show HN：Paca——面向人机协作的轻量级 Jira 替代品
items.summary_en: Paca introduces a lightweight Jira alternative tailored for human-AI collaboration, simplifying issue tracking while enabling AI-assisted workflows. The project aims to reduce setup friction and empower teams to work with AI copilots without heavy infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Paca 提供一个面向人机协作的轻量级 Jira 替代方案，简化问题跟踪并支持 AI 辅助工作流。该项目意在降低上手成本，使团队在无需繁重基础设施的情况下与 AI 助手协同工作。

items.title_en: Apt Encounters of the Third Kind
items.title_zh: 第三类接触：APT遭遇
items.summary_en: Explores several high-profile APT incidents and security research lessons, weaving together how attacker tradecraft evolves and how defenders can respond with better detection, telemetry, and response playbooks. The post emphasizes the human and organizational factors alongside technical indicators. It may include case studies and defensive recommendations.
items.summary_zh: 探讨若干知名的 APT 事件及安全研究经验，揭示攻击者的战术如何演变，以及防守方如何通过更好的检测、遥测与响应流程应对。文章强调人因与组织因素在技术指标之外的重要性，并给出案例分析和防御建议。

items.title_en: Shepherd's Dog: A Game by Fable
items.title_zh: Fable 的游戏《Shepherd's Dog》
items.summary_en: Shepherd's Dog from Studio Fable appears to be an indie, narrative-focused game, signaling the ongoing vitality of experimental storytelling in small teams. It highlights how indie titles continue to push inventive gameplay concepts.
items.summary_zh: Fable 工作室的独立游戏《Shepherd's Dog》似乎是一款以叙事为核心的实验性作品，展示小团队在独立游戏领域持续推动创新玩法。

items.title_en: Orthodox C++ (2016)
items.title_zh: 正统的 C++
items.summary_en: A call for robust, traditional C++ practices, emphasizing correctness, performance predictability, and disciplined language use over hype. The piece offers practical guidelines and cautions against over-fancy solutions that erode readability and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 倡导稳健、传统的 C++ 编程实践，强调正确性、性能可预测性以及对语言的克制使用，警惕追逐新花哨特性而损害可读性和可靠性的趋势。文中给出实际的指导要点并提出相关警示。

items.title_en: Ancient genome duplications laid the foundations of complex brains
items.title_zh: 远古基因组重复奠定了复杂大脑的基础
items.summary_en: New research links ancient whole-genome duplications to the emergence of complex brain structures, suggesting early vertebrates leveraged gene duplications to diversify neural circuits. The findings illuminate long-standing questions about brain evolution and may influence how we study genomic architectures in the future.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究将远古的全基因组重复与大脑结构复杂性的出现联系起来，提示早期脊椎动物通过基因重复来扩展神经回路。研究结果揭示大脑进化的长期问题，或影响未来对基因组结构的研究方向。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bastion – isolated Linux VMs for background coding agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Bastion – 用于后台编码代理的隔离 Linux 虚拟机
items.summary_en: Bastion offers isolated, ephemeral Linux VMs to run background coding agents, enabling safe experimentation and reproducible environments. It describes provisioning, isolation guarantees, and how this approach can improve developer workflows.
items.summary_zh: Bastion 提供隔离且短暂的 Linux 虚拟机，用于运行后台编码代理，实现安全试验与可重复的开发环境。文章介绍了快速部署、隔离保证，以及该方法如何提升开发者工作流的效率。

items.title_en: The Difference Between Rest and Idleness
items.title_zh: 休息与闲暇的区别
items.summary_en: Rest vs. idleness: rest is purposeful recovery, while idleness is unproductive downtime, and suggests practical strategies to design work routines that balance focus with meaningful breaks.
items.summary_zh: 文章区分了休息与闲散，认为休息是有目的的身心恢复，而闲散则可能无意义地耗散时间；并给出设计工作节奏的策略，倡导在工作中留出有意义的休息与高效的能量管理。

items.title_en: Codex for open source
items.title_zh: 面向开源的软件 Codex
items.summary_en: OpenAI is launching Codex for Open Source, offering OSS maintainers access to Codex-powered tooling to assist with coding tasks, documentation, and maintenance. The program aims to accelerate open-source development while addressing licensing and attribution considerations in collaborative projects.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出面向开源的软件 Codex，向开源项目维护者提供 Codex 驱动的工具，以帮助代码编写、文档撰写和维护工作。这项计划旨在加速开源开发，同时在协作项目中处理许可和署名等问题。

items.title_en: The state of building user interfaces in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 构建用户界面的现状
items.summary_en: The Rust UI scene is growing but still lacks a single dominant framework. Projects like egui, Dioxus, Iced, and GTK bindings push forward, yet tradeoffs around portability, ergonomics, and performance persist. The landscape matters for developers evaluating Rust for front-end or tool UIs.
items.summary_zh: Rust 构建用户界面的生态正在发展，但尚未出现一个主导的框架。诸如 egui、Dioxus、Iced 与 GTK 绑定等项目持续推进，但在可移植性、易用性与性能之间仍存在权衡。对于评估在前端或工具 UI 中使用 Rust 的开发者来说，这一生态格局很关键。

items.title_en: Show HN: I am building a map of people who lived in the Roman Empire
items.title_zh: Show HN：我在建立一张居住在罗马帝国时期的人的地图
items.summary_en: A hobbyist project maps historical figures to places in the Roman Empire, using historical records to visualize ancient demographics. The effort demonstrates crowdsourcing, data visualization, and ongoing data curation with potential value for historians and educators, while raising questions about source quality and representation.
items.summary_zh: 一个爱好者项目尝试把历史人物与罗马帝国时期的居住地点对应起来，通过历史记录可视化古代人口分布。该工作展示了众包、数据可视化与持续的数据整理在历史教育与研究中的潜在价值，同时也引发对数据源质量与表示方式的讨论。

items.title_en: Python 3.14 garbage collection rigamarole
items.title_zh: Python 3.14 垃圾回收的混乱
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at the changes and tensions around Python 3.14's garbage collection, explaining how the new heuristics impact pause times and memory profiles. It provides practical guidance for tuning performance-sensitive apps and highlights why GC behavior matters for long-running services. The piece helps developers decide when to tighten or loosen GC settings.
items.summary_zh: 深入解读 Python 3.14 垃圾回收的新特性与争议，说明新启发式对暂停时间和内存形态的影响。给出针对性能敏感应用的调优建议，并强调 GC 行为对长期运行服务的重要性。帮助开发者判断何时收紧或放宽 GC 设置。

items.title_en: FreeOberon – Open-Source, Cross-Platform, Free Pascal/Turbo Pascal-Like Language
items.title_zh: FreeOberon：开源、跨平台的 Oberon 风格语言
items.summary_en: FreeOberon presents an open-source, cross-platform take on the Oberon language, offering Pascal-like syntax and a compact toolchain. It aims to rekindle interest in language design from the Niklaus Wirth era while staying usable on modern systems. The project is of interest to language designers and hobbyists exploring minimal, robust toolchains.
items.summary_zh: FreeOberon 提供开源、跨平台的 Oberon 语言实现，保留 Pascal 风格的语法与紧凑的工具链。旨在唤起人们对尼古拉斯·沃尔特时代语言设计的兴趣，同时在现代系统上保持可用。对于语言设计者和热衷于极简且稳健工具链的爱好者有一定吸引力。

items.title_en: Appreciating Exif
items.title_zh: 欣赏 Exif 数据
items.summary_en: Exif metadata often goes overlooked despite its practical value for organizing, debugging, and tracing image provenance.
items.summary_zh: Exif 元数据在组织、调试和追踪图片来源方面极具实用价值，但常被忽视。本文强调元数据如何丰富照片信息，以及随之而来的隐私考量。

items.title_en: Pyodide 314.0: Python packages can now publish WebAssembly wheels to PyPI
items.title_zh: Pyodide 314.0：Python 包现在可将 WebAssembly wheel 发布到 PyPI
items.summary_en: Pyodide 314.0 enables Python packages to publish WebAssembly wheels directly to PyPI, lowering the barrier for running Python in the browser and on edge environments. By standardizing WASM wheels, developers can distribute browser-ready Python code alongside native wheels, accelerating web-based Python apps and computational notebooks. Expect changes to packaging workflows, compatibility considerations, and potential security tradeoffs when shipping browser-optimized Python.
items.summary_zh: Pyodide 314.0 现已支持将 WebAssembly wheel 直接发布到 PyPI，降低在浏览器和边缘环境中运行 Python 的门槛。标准化 WASM wheel 让开发者能够把浏览器就绪的 Python 代码与原生轮子一同分发，加速网页端 Python 应用和计算笔记本的部署。这一举措也将带来打包流程、兼容性与在浏览器中执行的安全性权衡。

items.title_en: Resurrecting a soaked, corroded, and damaged Commodore SX‑64 (2025)
items.title_zh: 浸水、腐蚀与损坏的 Commodore SX-64 的复原之旅（2025）
items.summary_en: An effort to revive a water-damaged Commodore SX-64 in 2025 demonstrates the difficulty of restoring vintage hardware, from cleaning corrosion to replacing failed components. The project underlines the enduring appeal of retro computing and the technical skills needed to resurrect classic machines.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年的一个复原项目记录了对一台被浸水腐蚀、损坏的 Commodore SX-64 的修复过程。修复工作揭示了恢复老旧硬件的诸多挑战，从处理腐蚀、修复电路到保护原件与 ROM 的难度，体现了复古计算机的持续魅力。

items.title_en: (Re//Verse 2026) Taxonomy and Deobfuscation of a Real World Binary Obfuscator [pdf]
items.title_zh: RE//Verse 2026：真实世界二进制混淆器的分类与去混淆 [PDF]
items.summary_en: The talk presents a taxonomy of real-world binary obfuscation techniques and practical deobfuscation methods, helping defenders understand how obfuscation hides intent and how to reverse engineer obscured code.
items.summary_zh: 该演讲对真实世界二进制混淳技术进行了分类，并给出去混淳的实用方法，帮助安全研究者理解混淆如何隐藏意图并提供系统化的逆向分析思路。

items.title_en: LaserWriter seeds
items.title_zh: LaserWriter 种子
items.summary_en: LaserWriter seeds examines how early printer/desktop publishing tech informs today's creative workflows and distribution models.
items.summary_zh: LaserWriter 种子一文探讨早期打印机与桌面出版技术如何影响当今的创作工作流与分发模式。

items.title_en: 500-year-old monasteries outperform at digital transformation (U. of Zurich)
items.title_zh: 500年历史的修道院在数字化转型中更具成效（苏黎世大学研究）
items.summary_en: A University of Zurich study shows historic monasteries outperform in digital transformation, suggesting governance, archival discipline, and long-term planning help institutions adapt to technology. The takeaway is that old-world organizational habits—careful data stewardship and collaborative culture—can outperform some modern entities in digital adoption.
items.summary_zh: 苏黎世大学的一项研究显示，历史悠久的修道院在数字化转型中表现更佳，暗示治理结构、档案管理和长期规划有利于技术适配。核心启示是，古老的组织习惯如数据治理与协作文化，能在数字化进程中胜过部分现代机构。

items.title_en: Beagle: Git, URIs and all the dirty words
items.title_zh: Beagle：Git、URI 与那些“脏话”
items.summary_en: It highlights design challenges around reproducibility, security, and how to treat dirty words—ambiguous or problematic identifiers—in a practical system.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨 Beagle 将 Git 与基于 URI 的寻址结合的设计思路，讨论在现代工具链中如何管理引用、可追溯性与命名。围绕可重复性、安全性等设计难题展开，特别是如何在实际系统中处理那些被称作 dirty words 的不确定标识。

items.title_en: The Neat Little Vehicles That Run a Cemetery
items.title_zh: 在墓园运行的那些整洁的小型车辆
items.summary_en: These autonomous, compact maintenance vehicles navigate cemetery grounds to handle repetitive tasks with precision, showcasing how automation can maintain sensitive landscapes quietly and reliably.
items.summary_zh: 该文介绍在墓园中运行的自动化迷你车辆，展示了自动化如何承担重复的园区维护任务，同时保持安静、庄重的环境。
